content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer

--Vehicle total by make

SELECT 
make,
COUNT(make) AS total_count
FROM
OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://electric-vehicle-data@asynapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/vehicle.csv', 
        FORMAT = 'CSV', 
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0', 
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
        ) WITH (
            vehicleID           INT,
            vin                 VARCHAR(10),
            modelYEar           SMALLINT,
            make                VARCHAR(25), 
            model               VARCHAR(25),
            electricRange       SMALLINT,
            baseMSRP           INT,
            vehicheTypeId       SMALLINT,
            cafvEligibilityId   SMALLINT,
            vehicleLocation     VARCHAR(30)
            )
        AS [result]
    GROUP BY make
    HAVING COUNT(make) > 1000;
